content.full_text:
May 2, 2001

David Bauer
400 Capitol Mall, Suite 1560
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-101

Dear Mr. Bauer:

This correspondence memorializes our May 1, 2001, conversation concerning the withdrawal your April 20, 2001, letter to the Fair Political Practices Commission requesting hypothetical advice on criteria for contribution itemization. (Regulation 18329(c).)

We encourage you to contact our toll-free help line with questions you may have regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ at 1-866-275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Joan Giannetta
Secretary, Legal Division

/jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
